prompt.name: Coherence Coach Track — S6.7 Phase 6 集成 + 冻结
prompt.sub_stage_name: Phase 6 管线集成 + MAPE-K 布线 + 全量回归 + 合约冻结 + 状态更新
prompt.role: 你是 Coherence Coach Track S6.7 实现者。 你的任务是：将 S6.1-S6.6 的所有组件（MAPE-K 五组件 + 三类向量记忆 + 三层多智能体） 集成到 CoachAgent.act() 管线中，完成全量回归测试、Phase 6 合约冻结和全局状态更新。 这是 Phase 6 的收尾子阶段。
prompt.context:
已完成的子阶段： - S6.1: contracts/mapek_loop.json — MAPE-K 五组件接口合约 - S6.2: src/mapek/monitor.py + analyze.py — 感知层与分析层 - S6.3: src/mapek/plan.py + execute.py — 规划层与执行层 - S6.4: src/mapek/knowledge.py — 知识仓库 CRUD + 置信度管理 - S6.5: src/coach/memory.py 升级 — ArchivalMemory + WorkingMemory + RMM - S6.6: src/coach/handlers.py + composer/agent 升级 — 三层多智能体
集成后的 CoachAgent.act() 完整管线： ``` CoachAgent.act() [CEO 层] ├── _ceo_judge() → macro_strategy + suggested_action_type [S6.6] │ ├── Monitor.ingest(user_input, context) [S6.2] ← 感知输入 ├── Analyze.diagnose(Monitor.snapshot()) [S6.2] ← 深层诊断 ├── Plan.generate(analysis_report) [S6.3] ← 策略生成 │ ├── PolicyComposer.compose(plan, context) [S6.6] ← Manager 层 │ ├── HandlerRegistry.handle() [S6.6] ← Specialist 层 │ └── Domain Passport (Phase 5) [S5.4] ← 跨域保护 │ ├── (Phase 5 三件套闸门) [S5.1-S5.3] │ ├── Execute.dispatch(dsl_packet) [S6.3] ← 分发执行 ├── Knowledge.record(execution) [S6.4] ← 记录证据 │ ├── WorkingMemory.set(key, dsl_packet) [S6.5] ← 工作记忆 ├── ArchivalMemory.store(dsl_packet) [S6.5] ← 档案归档 └── RMM.run() (每 N 轮) [S6.5] ← 后台整理 ```
注意：MAPE-K 组件默认 OFF（enabled=false）。启用后作为外循环运行在 act() 中。 Phase 5 三件套的集成已经在 Phase 5 完成，S6.7 不修改它们。
prompt.task: 1) 在 CoachAgent.act() 中集成 MAPE-K 五组件（受 config enabled 控制） 2) 在 CoachAgent.act() 中集成向量记忆（WorkingMemory 写入 + ArchivalMemory 归档 + RMM） 3) 确认 Execute.dispatch() 对 CoachAgent / Ledger / Audit 的真实调用 4) 标记 contracts/mapek_loop.json → frozen 5) 标记 config/coach_defaults.yaml Phase 6 → frozen: true 6) 全量回归：python -m pytest tests/ -q 全部 pass 7) 更新 reports/coach_global_state.json Phase 6 → GO 8) 输出 Phase 6 完结摘要报告

implementation_steps.step:
修改 src/coach/agent.py，在 act() 中增加 MAPE-K 循环（受 enabled 控制）：
```python class CoachAgent: def __init__(self, config: dict | None = None): # ... 已有初始化 ...
# ── S6.2-S6.4: MAPE-K 组件（延迟加载）── self._monitor = None self._analyze = None self._plan = None self._execute = None self._knowledge = None
# ── S6.5: 向量记忆 ── self._archival_memory = None self._working_memory = None self._rmm = None
def _ensure_mapek(self): """延迟加载 MAPE-K 组件。""" mapek_cfg = self._config.get("mapek", {}) if not mapek_cfg.get("enabled", False): return
if self._monitor is None: from src.mapek import Monitor, Analyze, Plan, Execute, Knowledge self._monitor = Monitor( buffer_size=mapek_cfg.get("monitor", {}).get("buffer_size", 100), dedup_window_s=mapek_cfg.get("monitor", {}).get("dedup_window_s", 5), ) self._analyze = Analyze( min_confidence=mapek_cfg.get("analyze", {}).get("min_confidence", 0.3), ) self._plan = Plan( max_horizon_steps=mapek_cfg.get("plan", {}).get("max_horizon_steps", 5), ) self._execute = Execute( max_retries=mapek_cfg.get("execute", {}).get("max_retries", 2), ) self._knowledge = Knowledge( confidence_decay_rate=mapek_cfg.get("knowledge", {}).get( "confidence_decay_rate", 0.05), archival_after_days=mapek_cfg.get("knowledge", {}).get( "archival_after_days", 30), )
def _ensure_memory_ext(self): """延迟加载 S6.5 向量记忆组件。""" if self._archival_memory is None: from src.coach.memory import ArchivalMemory, WorkingMemory, \ ReflectiveMemoryManager self._archival_memory = ArchivalMemory() self._working_memory = WorkingMemory() self._rmm = ReflectiveMemoryManager( self._archival_memory, decay_rate=self._config.get("mapek", {}).get("knowledge", {}).get( "confidence_decay_rate", 0.05), )
def act(self, user_input: str, context: dict | None = None) -> dict: """CEO 入口：宏观判断 → MAPE-K（可选）→ Manager → 返回。
Returns: dict (DSL action packet with execution metadata) """ ctx = context or {} mapek_enabled = self._config.get("mapek", {}).get("enabled", False)
# ── 1. CEO 宏观判断 ── ceo_strategy = self._ceo_judge(user_input, ctx)
# ── 2. MAPE-K 循环（可选）─ if mapek_enabled: self._ensure_mapek() self._ensure_memory_ext()
# 2a. Monitor: 感知 self._monitor.ingest({ "content": user_input, "source": "user", "timestamp": self._now_utc(), **ctx, }) snapshot = self._monitor.snapshot()
# 2b. Analyze: 诊断 analysis = self._analyze.diagnose(snapshot)
# 2c. Plan: 策略 plan_result = self._plan.generate(analysis) self._knowledge.record_strategy(plan_result)
# 2d. 将 Plan 结果注入 CEO 策略和 context ceo_strategy["mapek_plan"] = plan_result ctx["plan_result"] = plan_result ctx["analysis_report"] = analysis
# ── 3. Manager 层：动作选择 + Handler 路由 ── packet = self._composer.compose(ceo_strategy, ctx)
# ── 4. Execute: 分发（可选）─ if mapek_enabled: execution = self._execute.dispatch(packet, ctx) self._knowledge.record_experiment({ "variant_id": packet.get("trace_id"), "action_type": packet.get("action_type"), "outcome": execution.get("all_success"), "ceo_strategy": ceo_strategy.get("macro_strategy"), }) packet["execution"] = execution
# 5. 向量记忆：WorkingMemory + ArchivalMemory self._working_memory.set("last_action", packet) archived_id = self._archival_memory.store( content=str(packet), source_tag=f"action:{packet.get('action_type')}", metadata=str({ "trace_id": packet.get("trace_id"), "intent": packet.get("intent"), }), ) packet["archived_id"] = archived_id
# 6. RMM: 每 N 轮触发 rmm_result = self._rmm.run() if rmm_result.get("decayed", 0) > 0: packet["rmm_result"] = rmm_result
# ── 7. Coach 元信息 ── packet["coach_meta"] = { "ceo_strategy": ceo_strategy.get("macro_strategy"), "ttm_stage": ceo_strategy.get("ttm_stage"), "mapek_enabled": mapek_enabled, "phase6_integrated": True, } return packet
def _now_utc(self) -> str: from datetime import datetime, timezone return datetime.now(timezone.utc).strftime( '%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S.%f')[:-3] + 'Z' ```
关键集成原则： - MAPE-K 受 config mapek.enabled 控制，默认 OFF。不影响 act() 既有行为 - 所有 MAPE-K 组件延迟加载（_ensure_mapek()），第一次使能时初始化 - 向量记忆同属延迟加载（_ensure_memory_ext()） - Phase 5 三件套的闸门已经在 S5.5 集成，S6.7 不修改

``` # 标记 mapek_loop.json → frozen contracts/mapek_loop.json: - "status": "draft" → "status": "frozen" - "frozen_at": null → "frozen_at": "" - 不修改任何已有字段
# 标记 coach_defaults.yaml Phase 6 → frozen config/coach_defaults.yaml: - 在 mapek 段下追加 frozen: true - 不修改任何已有配置值 ```

执行： ```bash cd D:/Claudedaoy/coherence && python -m pytest tests/ -q ```
期望：916+ 已有测试全部 pass + Phase 6 新增 55+ 测试全部 pass 如果失败，定位失败测试并修复，直到全绿。

更新 reports/coach_global_state.json：
```json "phase_6": { "status": "GO", "executed_at_utc": "", "sub_stages": { "S6.1": "GO", "S6.2": "GO", "S6.3": "GO", "S6.4": "GO", "S6.5": "GO", "S6.6": "GO", "S6.7": "GO" }, "deliverables": { "contract_mapek_loop": "frozen", "src_mapek_package": "5 components", "vector_memory": "ArchivalMemory+WorkingMemory+RMM", "multi_agent_layering": "CEO+Manager+Specialist", "new_tests": 55, "total_tests": "971+" }, "phase_5": { "status": "GO", "note": "Phase 5 — semantic safety triple completed prior to Phase 6" } } ```
注意保持现有 global_state.json 中之前 phase 的字段完整。

输出到控制台或 reports/phase6_completion.md 的摘要：
``` ════════════════════════════════════════ Phase 6 — 完结报告 ════════════════════════════════════════
子阶段: [GO] S6.1 — MAPE-K 合约冻结 [GO] S6.2 — Monitor + Analyze [GO] S6.3 — Plan + Execute [GO] S6.4 — Knowledge 仓库 [GO] S6.5 — 向量记忆升级 [GO] S6.6 — 多智能体分层 [GO] S6.7 — 集成 + 冻结
合约: contracts/mapek_loop.json → FROZEN v1.0.0
代码: src/mapek/ → 5 个组件 src/coach/memory.py → +3 记忆类 src/coach/handlers.py → 4 个 Handler src/coach/agent.py → CEO 层 src/coach/composer.py → Manager 层
测试: 新增 55+ 测试 → 全部 pass 已有 916 测试 → 零回归
状态: PHASE 6 GO ✅ ```

file_change_summary.change: +80 行: MAPE-K 集成 + 向量记忆布线 + CEO 增强
+15 行: Execute 真实 ledger 调用
2 行: status draft → frozen, frozen_at 填充
+1 行: mapek 段追加 frozen: true

prompt.success_criteria: 1. CoachAgent.act() 在 mapek.enabled=false 时行为与之前完全一致 2. CoachAgent.act() 在 mapek.enabled=true 时走完 Monitor→Analyze→Plan→Execute→Knowledge 全链路 3. WorkingMemory 和 ArchivalMemory 在 MAPE-K 启用时自动写入 4. RMM.run() 每 N 次 act() 调用后触发 5. Execute._write_ledger() 真实调用 EventStore.append_event() 6. contracts/mapek_loop.json status="frozen" + frozen_at 非空 7. config/coach_defaults.yaml mapek 段 frozen: true 8. 全量回归：新增 55+ + 已有 916+ 全部 pass 9. reports/coach_global_state.json Phase 6 → GO 10. Phase 5 三件套不受影响 11. Phase 4 三个模型不受影响 12. 现有 act() 接口签名未改变
